title: lepidadenia noronhae
intro: Lepidadenia noronhae, also known as the Noronha's Lepidadenia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Compositae. Traditionally used in folk medicine, Lepidadenia noronhae is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Its health benefits include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help in alleviating symptoms associated with colds, flu, and bronchitis. Lepidadenia noronhae is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and its leaves are also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
